Contact Rare & Manuscript Collections

Icarus records, 1976-2008.
Collection Number: 4412

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Library

DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY

Title:
Icarus records, 1976-2008.
Repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Collection Number:
4412
Abstract:
Manuscripts submitted for publication which were rejected, withdrawn, or accepted, with referee reports.
Creator:
Quanitities:
188.3 cubic feet.
Language:
Collection material in English
Biographical / Historical

Icarus is the international journal of solar system studies.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION

Manuscripts submitted for publication which were rejected, withdrawn, or accepted, with referee reports.
INFORMATION FOR USERS
Cite As:

Icarus Records, #4412. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:

Records older than 50 years are not restricted. To access records less than 50 years, permission needs to be obtained by the Icarus Editor-in-Chief. Because the folders are not dated in the Icarus finding aid, please contact rareref@cornell.edu with the title of the specific folder you would like to see and a staff member will review the folder and let you know if it is restricted.
SUBJECTS

Subjects:
Solar system -- Periodicals.
